task_completion.description: Vital Recorder application is visible with the correct case file loaded
task_completion.visual_evidence: Vital Recorder window is open, and the interface or title bar indicates that '0001.vital' is the active recording.

task_completion.description: The intraoperative time segment is selected or specified for export
task_completion.visual_evidence: The time range from approximately 00:27:48 ('Surgery started') to 02:52:48 ('Surgery finished') is highlighted on the timeline, selected in the event list, or explicitly entered into an export time range dialog.

task_completion.description: The export dialog is opened and configured for CSV format
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export or save dialog is visible on screen with 'CSV' selected as the output file type or format.

task_completion.description: The destination file path is set correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The save dialog shows the file name as 'intraop_0001.csv' and the destination folder as the Desktop (C:\Users\Docker\Desktop).

task_completion.description: The export process is executed and completed
task_completion.visual_evidence: A progress bar indicating the export is running, a success confirmation message, or the 'intraop_0001.csv' file icon appearing on the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the Vital Recorder GUI to perform the export
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interactions with Vital Recorder's menus, timeline, and dialogs, rather than terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The CSV file was generated by the application's export function
integrity.visual_evidence: The export dialog and progress indicators are shown, confirming the file wasn't just created as an empty file or mocked.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create a fake CSV file
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad) or terminal windows are used to echo, paste, or manually write data into 'intraop_0001.csv'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The case 0001.vital has a total duration of 3h 12m 22s. The intraoperative period starts at 'Surgery started' (00:27:48) and ends at 'Surgery finished' (02:52:48). The agent must select this specific time range (approx 145 minutes) for export. The final output must be saved as a CSV file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\intraop_0001.csv.
